title: Microcontroller device-model specification
description: Schema for device-model spec files. A model spec describes a specific part number (e.g. stm32u031c4), including its package, memory sizes, available peripheral instances, alternate-function pin mappings, and errata. It references its parent family spec via 'family-ref'.

spec-version.description: Spec format version using semantic versioning (semver), e.g. '1.0.0'. Increment the patch version for corrections, the minor version for backward-compatible additions, and the major version for breaking changes.

vendor.description: Chip vendor name, e.g. 'STMicroelectronics'. Must match the vendor field in the referenced family spec.

family-ref.description: Family spec identifier (without the .yml extension), e.g. 'stm32u0'. Tooling resolves this to docs/specs/{vendor-dir}/{family-ref}.yml.

model.description: Part number identifier in lowercase, e.g. 'stm32u031c4'. Must match the filename (without .yml extension).

package.description: Package code as used in the part number suffix, e.g. 'UFQFPN32', 'LQFP48', 'WLCSP25'.

flash-kb.description: On-chip flash memory size in kibibytes.

sram-kb.description: On-chip SRAM size in kibibytes (total, across all SRAM banks).

pin-count.description: Total number of pins on the physical package.

peripheral-availability.description: Lists which peripheral instances from the family spec are present on this device. Omit for instances that are unavailable (e.g. absent GPIO ports on smaller packages).

alternate-functions.description: Alternate-function pin-mapping table for this specific model and package. Each entry maps a pin name to its available alternate functions.

errata.description: Known hardware errata for this silicon. Each entry has a title, a description, and an optional silicon-revision applicability list.

peripheral-availability-entry.description: Records which instances of a given peripheral type are present on this device model.

peripheral.description: Peripheral type name as it appears in the family spec (e.g. 'gpio', 'usart').

instances.description: List of instance names (e.g. 'GPIOA', 'GPIOB') that are present on this device model.

pin-af-entry.description: Alternate-function assignments for a single pin.

pin.description: Pin name in the form 'P{port}{number}', e.g. 'PA0', 'PB13'.

functions.description: Mapping from AF code (AF0–AF15) to the signal name assigned to that AF on this pin (e.g. 'TIM2_CH1', 'USART1_TX'). Use null for AF slots that are not assigned.

description.description: Full description of the erratum including workaround if known.

silicon-revisions.description: Silicon revision codes to which this erratum applies (e.g. ['A', 'B']). Omit if the erratum applies to all known revisions.
